Bu asamadaki operasyonu kapatir ve durumu gunceller.
Bu ekran PT tarafinda hangi rol ile neden acildigini netlestirir.

Bu ekran once ana urunu ve miktari secmenizi, sonra uretimi asamalara bolmenizi, en son da hangi asamanin once veya ayni anda ilerleyecegini belirlemenizi saglar. Kayit aninda sistem plani uretim emirlerine cevirir.

Bu ekran, uretim planindaki bir asamaya malzeme beslemek, ara mamulu sonraki istasyona tasimak veya tamamlanan urunu mamul depoya almak icin transfer emri olusturur. Oneri paneli, secili plan veya emrin ihtiyacindan otomatik satir uretir.
Bu ekrani goruntuleyebilirsiniz ancak grup atamalarini guncellemek icin update yetkisi gerekir.

If a work order already exists, enter it here. The system fills the main product, variant, and key planning fields in Step 1.
If no stock-specific or group-specific rule exists, the system falls back to these settings before accepting, quarantining, or opening an inspection.
If no work order exists yet, choose the main product, optional variant, and quantity. The system fills Step 1 based on stock information.
If plate arrived but is not suitable, reject it. Rejection reason is mandatory when rejected quantity exists.
If recurring entitlement is used in parts, this defines the maximum quantity per issue.
If the 3-month entitlement is used in parts, this defines the maximum quantity per issue.
If the 3-month entitlement will be used in parts, this defines how many days must pass between issues.
If the plate arrived and is suitable in quality/documents, approve it. Only approved quantity proceeds to the next step.
If the plate did not arrive, mark as missing. For partial arrivals, record arrived, approved and rejected quantities separately.
If the recurring entitlement is used in parts, this defines how many days must pass between issues.
If the same plate arrives again on the same day, no new record is created; the existing record is updated.
If the same plate arrives on a different day, the system records it as a new entry.

This record is used as the DB-first barcode definition for the current branch. If the same module key exists, it overrides configuration.

This screen defines entitlements by group code; stock code is not the main decision field here. The employee first uses the initial entitlement, then the 3-month entitlement, and afterwards the recurring entitlement.
This screen does not make the final decision itself; it defines how incoming material enters the quality flow.
This screen does not perform OCR; it only manages the mapping between customer stock codes and our stock cards.
This screen shows remaining entitlements before QR/barcode flow. It uses the same entitlement API as distribution; results match operations.

When enabled, the employee may receive the full initial entitlement in one issue. When disabled, the system forces partial usage and applies the frequency-day rule if defined.
When enabled, the full 3-month entitlement can be taken in one issue. Otherwise the system allows only partial usage.
When enabled, the full recurring entitlement can be taken in one issue. Otherwise the system enforces partial usage.
